summary: Doc build failed because a Python SyntaxError occurred while importing transformers.modeling_utils due to unresolved merge conflict markers, which prevented conversion of docs/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to MDX.
root_cause: Unresolved git merge conflict marker '<<<<<<< sonic-moe' present in /home/runner/work/transformers/transformers/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/transformers/modeling_utils.py caused a SyntaxError during import, breaking the doc autogeneration and MDX conversion of ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md.

evidence.reason: Shows an unresolved git merge conflict marker inside the Python file which will produce invalid syntax.
Identifies the exact Python file and line where the syntax error occurred.
Confirms the import/parsing of the Python file failed with a SyntaxError.

evidence.quote: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: Shows the downstream failure: the doc conversion of llama.md failed due to the preceding SyntaxError during autodoc processing.

suggested_fix: Open and resolve the merge conflict in modeling_utils.py (remove conflict markers like '<<<<<<< sonic-moe' and the corresponding '=======' / '>>>>>>>' sections), ensure the file is valid Python, commit the fix, and re-run the docs build.
